children.heading: In general1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1
children.label: a In general1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to establish a partnership of Department of Energy laboratories, academic institutions, and private sector industries to conduct environmentally-related education programs, including programs involving environmentally conscious manufacturing and waste management activities that have undergraduate and graduate educational training as a component.
